name: Sunrise Bank
description_short: Community bank offering personal and business banking, mortgages, and loans with local branch service in Florida.
description_long: Sunrise Bank is a community-based financial institution headquartered in Ormond Beach, Florida, with a focus on personalized customer relationships and local market presence. Founded in 1977, the bank has operated for nearly five decades as a locally-owned alternative to national chain banks, emphasizing relationship-based banking over transactional interactions. The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial services including personal checking and savings accounts, residential mortgages, commercial loans, business online banking, Health Savings Accounts (HSAs), and mobile wallet capabilities. They provide routing numbers for fund transfers, online banking platforms, ATM access, and financial calculators. Their commercial lending division serves small and medium-sized businesses with loan products and dedicated business banking solutions. Sunrise Bank differentiates itself through high-touch customer service, with testimonials emphasizing personal branch manager relationships and the ability to speak directly with banking representatives rather than automated systems. They offer a "bank on wheels" mobile service that visits business locations by request. The institution is FDIC-insured and actively engaged in community partnerships, recently joining OurSeniors.net Magazine as an Approved Vendor to serve senior customers in the Ormond Beach area. The bank serves primarily small business owners and individuals seeking relationship-based banking in Florida's Volusia County region. However, their limited branch footprint and local-only presence may restrict accessibility for customers outside their service area or those preferring national banking networks. The website provides basic service information but lacks detailed product specifications, fee schedules, or interest rate information.
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government
Personal relationship banking with named branch managers who recognize customers
Mobile banking service (bank on wheels) that visits business locations
Comprehensive business banking solutions with commercial loan options
Residential mortgage services for home purchases and refinancing
Health Savings Account (HSA) products available to qualified customers
Mobile wallet support for contactless payments at participating merchants
cons: Limited geographic presence restricted to Florida (Ormond Beach area), limiting accessibility
Website lacks detailed product specifications, fee schedules, and APR information
No information provided about minimum account balances, deposit requirements, or loan terms
Smaller institution may have fewer ATM locations and less advanced digital banking features compared to national banks
Limited online information about business loan qualification requirements and rates
best_for: Small business owners in the Ormond Beach/Volusia County area seeking relationship-based banking
Local individuals and families who value in-person service and knowing their branch manager
Senior customers seeking personalized financial services with community bank focus
Businesses needing commercial loans and business banking solutions with direct contact
diagnosis: Sunrise Bank is best for customers in the Ormond Beach, Florida area who value personal relationships with bank employees and prefer community banking over national chains. The main caveat is that this is a geographically-limited local bank with minimal online service details, making it unsuitable for customers outside its service region or those seeking transparent, published rate and fee information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
